# Everclip v1.0

Everclip is a lightweight macOS menu bar clipboard manager focused on fast keyboard-driven paste workflows.

## What's New

- Added clipboard history access from the menu bar.
- Added floating clipboard picker with keyboard navigation.
- Added multi-select paste support for clipboard items.
- Improved Enter-to-paste and click-to-paste behavior.
- Improved floating window positioning so it avoids the cursor and stays on screen.
- Added onboarding permission checks for macOS Accessibility access.
- Added support for text and image clipboard history.

## Installation

1. Download `Everclip.dmg`.
2. Open the DMG.
3. Drag `everclip.app` into `Applications`.
4. Launch Everclip and grant Accessibility permission when prompted.

## Notes

This build is locally signed and not notarized with an Apple Developer certificate. macOS may show a security warning the first time it is opened.
